title: Orochi’s Rage and Komurasaki’s Defiance
description: On pages 5–8, this part focuses on Unknown person #4, Robin, Toko, Orochi, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #6 as The Flower Capital erupts around Orochi and Komurasaki while Luffy is forced into Queen’s brutal prison games.
scene: Sanji, Robin, Nami, and others move through the capital as Orochi’s obsession with Komurasaki turns violent.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: you and the other NinjaAs need to stop the shogun....!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The Shogun can do as he pleases. Nobody can tell him what to do!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Besides, there is a more import-tant matter at hand.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We are currently trying to capture an intruder!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It's true that she's new in town, but....!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Hey, BIG SIS!! Please help the coursesan!!

dialogue.speaker: Orochi
dialogue.text: And since you angered the Shogun...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I don't even know if I can save YOU!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Please save us!! We're going to be cursed to death!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: What is going on over there!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: The Starving Skeleton isn't just a Fable!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Ah! I'm glad you're okay, O- Rob!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Bonekichi!! That was marvelous, thank you!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Please keep doing what you're doing!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: YOHOHO!! I'm pretty cool right now, aren't I!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Are they an army of ghosts!?

dialogue.speaker: Robin
dialogue.text: Even brook's in there with Robin now!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: There's no point in hiding any- more. Let's back them up!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: So you're still alive after all these years...!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You're the bewitching kunoichi who was known to seduce men and kill them!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: No, my apologies. I mistook you for someone else.

dialogue.speaker: Raizo
dialogue.text: Is that really a Ninja Art!?

summary: This section advances the Wano - Prison and Capital Crisis storyline with 49 dialogue beats. Orochi’s paranoia and Queen’s prison game raise the stakes on both sides of Wano.
